message:
test(state-persistence): add 21 unit tests for state persistence module

Covers: StorageError source/debug/From<io::Error>, MemoryStorage name/
is_available/debug/save-replaces-all, StateRegistry backend_name/
is_available/debug/set-overwrites/remove-nonexistent/load-replaces-cache/
load-clears-dirty/flush-persists/multiple-keys/remove-marks-dirty/
clear-after-flush, RegistryStats default/empty, StoredEntry clone/debug,
Arc shared concurrent access.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
